justifyingReasonForRequestEvent.text: Midshire PCT regularly monitors its practice lists and every quarter sends out letters to the last known address of patients who have not responded to screening calls or have missed appointments. A letter to Miss Naomi Wood elicited no response. Margaret Marks is in charge of list cleaning at the Midshire PCR Back Office and she enters the removal from Midtown Practice with reason ‘gone away – address not known’. PDS sends a PDS Demographics Notification of type 'Pending Removal' to the practice allowing them time to confirm if they are still treating Miss Wood. The requested removal is placed in pending on the Spine. Two weeks later Naomi attends the Midtown Practice with an earache. Mary, the receptionist notes that Naomi is due to be removed and checks that she is still resident locally. Naomi tells her that she has been away for a while but is now back.
